sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56570" key="kenoga/mion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κενογάμιον</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">γάμος</etym>) <sense id="n56570.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">empty, unreal marriage</tr_>, coined after <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κενοτάφιον</foreign> by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
